title: EQ - Custom EQ, change values on the sliders
scenario: Custom EQ sliders can have their values changed successfully in the Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: Open the Poly Studio Mobile app.
Tap on the connected device name to open Device Settings.
On the Custom EQ screen, locate the first frequency band slider.
Drag the slider up to increase its value.
Drag the slider down to decrease its value.
Repeat steps 7-9 for all remaining frequency band sliders on the Custom EQ screen.
expected: All sliders on the Custom EQ screen respond to touch input and their values change smoothly without any lag or snapping back to the original position.
